description: errorBoundary §19.6.5 priority #1 — a caught error variant WITH a `renders` clause shows the variant's own markup, NOT the boundary fallback. loadItem("missing") fails LoadError::NotFound(id) at mount; NotFound's `renders <div class="eb-notfound">Item ${id} not found</>` wins and substitutes the id payload. Sibling content outside the boundary survives (§19.6.4). OQ1 NOTE: the whole-tree dom is OMITTED — impl#1 wraps the boundary subtree in a private container <div>; the impl-neutral contract is the anchored author-class assertions.
rationale: §19.6.5 priority order: a variant's own `renders` clause takes precedence over the boundary's `fallback`. NotFound carries renders -> eb-notfound markup with the ${id} payload; eb-fallback never appears. §19.6.6: a `!`-call inside a boundary without explicit match/propagation does NOT trigger E-ERROR-002 (the boundary satisfies the handling requirement) -> the whole E-ERROR-* family stays silent.
